prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年郑州大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为26327→27082→29837→40636→28606名。2024年出现异常大幅后移至40636名，2025年显著回升至28606名，近两年波动较大，2025年基准位次约28606名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为169人，2025年增至170人，2026年计划178人，较2025年扩招约4.7%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第53名持续上升至2026年第44名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年声誉明显负面（安徽、广西投档线暴跌），2025年偏负面（全国投档线溃败、黑龙江低分录取），2026年偏负面（学校管理/校园安全舆情为主，程度减轻）；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；郑州大学在第五轮。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信等热门专业持续高热推荐，郑州大学在浙招生涵盖上述热门专业；浙江省考生总数2021–2025年持续增长（253436→290790），2026年约400000人，较2025年增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；省控线（普通类一段）2021–2025年稳定在488–497分之间，波动较小；郑州大学位于河南省（非本省），在浙江省招生占比约0.5%–1%，属跨省招生；浙江考生对省外211高校报考意愿中等，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28606名、2026年扩招4.7%、浙江省考生大幅增加37.6%导致竞争加剧、学校排名上升及抖音高热吸引更多关注，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约29614名，区间29114–30114名。

一档（最难进）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理（商业智能管理）、会计学）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间29114–30114名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（电子信息类、自动化类、软件工程等工科热门专业），一档专业（计算机科学与技术、中国语言文学类）可冲刺，三档专业（材料类、化学类、机械类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<29114名）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、临床医学等高分专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhengzhou University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were 26327 → 27082 → 29837 → 40636 → 28606. In 2024, there was an abnormal large drop to 40636, but in 2025 it significantly rebounded to 28606, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 28606. The enrollment plan for Zhengzhou University in Zhejiang's comprehensive category was 169 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 170 in 2025, and planned to be 178 in 2026, an expansion of about 4.7% compared to 2025, which is limited and has little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, its reputation was significantly negative (sharp drops in admission scores in Anhui and Guangxi), in 2025 it was somewhat negative (nationwide admission score collapse, low scores in Heilongjiang), and in 2026 it is somewhat negative (mainly campus management/safety incidents, with reduced severity). Its Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable application attention. Zhengzhou University is in the fifth round.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communications continue to be highly recommended. Zhengzhou University's enrollment in Zhejiang includes these popular majors. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province has been continuously increasing from 2021 to 2025 (253436 → 290790), and in 2026 it is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (general first segment) has been stable between 488–497 points from 2021 to 2025, with small fluctuations. Zhengzhou University is located in Henan Province (not local), with enrollment in Zhejiang accounting for about 0.5%–1%, making it cross-provincial enrollment. Zhejiang candidates have moderate willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities, with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28606, the 4.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the significant 37.6% increase in Zhejiang candidates intensifying competition, the rising university ranking, and high Douyin popularity attracting more attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29614, with a range of 29114–30114.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 29114–30114, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Automation, Software Engineering, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Chinese Language and Literature) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemistry, Mechanical) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<29114), you can focus on reaching for high-score majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Clinical Medicine.
